title: Cannabis use, effects and risks - Canada.ca
content:
## Cannabis use, effects and risks
Short-term, long-term health effects, mental health effects, impairment, safety risks, addiction
- Your cannabis questions answered
- Licensed cultivators, processors and sellers of cannabis under the Cannabis Act
- Get help with substance use
- Cannabis education resources

## Services and information

### Health effects of cannabis
Short-term and long-term health effects, pregnant women.

### Cannabis and mental health
Mental health effects, youth (cannabis and brain development).
Impairment symptoms, health and safety risks.

### Addiction to cannabis
Problematic substance use, addiction, who is at risk, how to get help.
About THC, CBD and terpenes, the chemical substances in cannabis; how cannabis is used and the different forms of cannabis.

### Talking to teenagers about cannabis
Talking tips, slang terms, points about cannabis.

### Cannabis poisonings in children
Learn to recognize the signs of cannabis poisoning and what to do about it.
